title: Warm Kenyan Olive Flatbread
description: Enjoy a savory, flaky Kenyan flatbread that blends Castelvetrano olives with mild spices, served warm from the skillet.
instructions: In a large bowl combine flour, salt, yeast, cumin, paprika and coriander.
Add warm water and olive oil, stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead for 6 minutes until smooth.
Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour until doubled.
Punch down dough, divide into 4 equal portions and roll each into a 12‑inch circle.
Heat a cast‑iron skillet over medium‑high heat, drizzle a little oil, and cook each flatbread for 2‑3 minutes per side until golden and blistered.
During the last minute of cooking scatter sliced olives on one side, close the lid, and let the olives soften in the heat.
Serve warm with a sprinkle of fresh coriander.
